sentences.target: Der Apparat ist schon wieder kaputt.

translations.de: Der Apparat ist schon wieder kaputt.
translations.es: La cafetera se ha vuelto a estropear.
translations.fr: La machine à café est encore en panne.
translations.it: La macchina del caffè si è rotta di nuovo.
translations.pt: A máquina de café quebrou de novo.
translations.vi: Máy pha cà phê lại hỏng rồi.
translations.hi: कॉफी मशीन फिर से खराब हो गई है।
translations.pl: Ekspres do kawy znowu się zepsuł.
translations.ja: コーヒーメーカーがまた壊れた。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner marking the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula), present 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb; part of the collocation 'schon wieder' emphasizing repetition.
Adverb meaning 'again'; together with 'schon' conveys 'yet again'.
Predicative adjective; predicate complement with the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Ich kenne den Apparat von der Arbeit.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə deːn apaˈʁaːt fɔn deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/

translations.de: Ich kenne den Apparat von der Arbeit.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə deːn apaˈʁaːt fɔn deːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/
translations.en: I know the device from work.
translations.fr: Je connais cette machine du boulot.
translations.it: Questa macchina la conosco dal lavoro.
translations.ko: 이 기계를 회사에서 써 봐서 알아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在公司用过这台机器。
translations.ru: Я знаю эту машину по работе.
translations.pt: Eu conheço essa máquina do trabalho.
translations.he: אני מכיר את המכונה הזאת מהעבודה.
translations.vi: Tôi biết máy này ở chỗ làm.
translations.ar: أنا أعرف هذه الآلة من العمل.
translations.nl: Die machine ken ik van het werk.
translations.uk: Я знаю цю машину з роботи.
translations.hu: Ezt a gépet a munkahelyről ismerem.
translations.hi: मैं इस मशीन को दफ़्तर से जानता हूँ।
translations.el: Ξέρω αυτό το μηχάνημα από τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Den maskinen kjenner jeg fra jobben.
translations.id: Saya kenal mesin ini dari kantor.
translations.sv: Den här maskinen känner jag igen från jobbet.
translations.ro: Cunosc aparatul ăsta de la serviciu.
translations.da: Den her maskine kender jeg fra arbejdet.
translations.fi: Tämä laite on minulle tuttu töistä.
translations.ja: この機械は職場で使っているので知ってます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite present 1st person singular; takes a direct object in the accusative.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'kenne'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating source/context.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner with 'Arbeit' after 'von'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'von'.

translations.en: The device is making strange noises.
translations.es: La lavadora está haciendo ruidos extraños.
translations.fr: La machine à laver fait des bruits bizarres.
translations.it: La lavatrice fa dei rumori strani.
translations.zh-Hans: 洗衣机发出奇怪的声音。
translations.pt: A máquina de lavar está fazendo barulhos estranhos.
translations.vi: Máy giặt phát ra tiếng kêu lạ.
translations.hu: A mosógép furcsa hangokat ad ki.
translations.hi: वॉशिंग मशीन अजीब आवाजें कर रही है।
translations.ro: Mașina de spălat scoate sunete ciudate.
translations.ja: 洗濯機が変な音を立てている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite present 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Attributive adjective, accusative plural (strong inflection); modifies 'Geräusche'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'macht'.

sentences.target: Wir stellen den Apparat ins Wohnzimmer.

translations.de: Wir stellen den Apparat ins Wohnzimmer.
translations.en: We are putting the device in the living room.
translations.es: Vamos a poner el purificador de aire en el salón.
translations.fr: On met le purificateur d’air dans le salon.
translations.it: Mettiamo il purificatore d’aria in salotto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把空气净化器放在客厅里。
translations.yue: 我哋將空氣淨化機擺喺客廳。
translations.ru: Мы ставим очиститель воздуха в гостиную.
translations.pt: Vamos colocar o purificador de ar na sala.
translations.he: אנחנו שמים את מטהר האוויר בסלון.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đặt máy lọc không khí trong phòng khách.
translations.ar: نضع منقّي الهواء في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: We zetten de luchtreiniger in de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Ми ставимо очищувач повітря у вітальню.
translations.hi: हम एयर प्यूरीफायर को लिविंग रूम में रख रहे हैं।
translations.el: Βάζουμε τον καθαριστή αέρα στο σαλόνι.
translations.id: Kami menaruh pembersih udara di ruang tamu.
translations.ro: Punem purificatorul de aer în sufragerie.
translations.ja: 空気清浄機をリビングに置いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite present 1st person plural; denotes causing an upright placement; takes a direct object and a directional PP.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'stellen'.
Contraction of 'in das'; two-way preposition governing accusative here to indicate direction/destination.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of the preposition, denoting the destination.

The device is making strange noises.
